packageManagement.resolver: select a package-set entry for the device architecture, fetch one or more referenced Packages.xz indexes, resolve Depends/Pre-Depends recursively, then download missing .deb files from the selected flat/full repository mirror
packageManagement.bootstrapMode: extract a bootstrap rootfs before installing package-set entries

entries.title: Base Bootstrap
entries.description: Minimal PyStudio terminal bootstrap with proot and core shell packages.

entries.title: Python/Pip Bootstrap
entries.description: PyStudio terminal bootstrap with proot, Python, and pip preinstalled.

entries.title: Python / Pip
entries.description: CPython runtime, pip, and their Termux dependencies.

entries.title: Node.js / npm
entries.description: Node.js runtime and npm package manager.

entries.title: PRoot Runtime
entries.description: Standalone PRoot runtime with Termux-maintained Android compatibility patches.

entries.title: C/C++ Toolchain
entries.description: Compiler, sysroot, CMake, Ninja, Make, and pkg-config.

entries.title: Tree-sitter Parsers
entries.description: Tree-sitter CLI, runtime library, and common parser grammars for editor features.

entries.title: Python LSP
entries.description: Pyright language server and Ruff linter/formatter for Python editing.

entries.title: Debug Tools
entries.description: debugpy plus LLDB and lldb-server for Python and native debugging.

entries.title: Git
entries.description: Git version control with SSH support for clone, fetch, and push workflows.

entries.title: Crypto / Network Native Libraries
entries.description: Native OpenSSL, libffi, libsodium, SSH, curl, HTTP/2, protobuf, gRPC, Kerberos, and c-ares dependencies.

entries.title: Data Native Libraries
entries.description: Native data storage and interchange libraries for DuckDB, Arrow, ORC, HDF5, NetCDF, SQLite, YAML, XML, and Zstd.

entries.title: Image Native Libraries
entries.description: Lightweight native JPEG, PNG, TIFF, WebP, OpenJPEG, FreeType, Fontconfig, and Leptonica dependencies for pip-built image packages.

entries.title: XML / HTML Native Libraries
entries.description: Native XML, HTML, YAML, tree-sitter, cleanup, and XML security dependencies.

entries.title: Media Native Libraries
entries.description: Lightweight native FLAC, Ogg/Vorbis/Opus, TagLib, WebP, PNG, and JPEG codec dependencies for pip-built media packages.

entries.title: Scientific Native Libraries
entries.description: Native numeric libraries commonly needed by NumPy, SciPy, sparse solvers, HDF5, NetCDF, and scientific wheels.

entries.title: Visualization Native Libraries
entries.description: Lightweight native plotting dependencies for pip-built visualization packages, avoiding Android SDK/Gradle dependency chains.

entries.title: Pip Build Core
entries.description: Pip, compilers, make, CMake, Ninja, pkg-config, pybind11, and common native headers.
